an addendum to the existing SLS agreement with Satsaco, I’m writing this
email to seek your approval.

perusal.

shuning.wang@shopee.com>
*Subject:* Re: [For Approval] SG Export LH and TWS vendor(SSO) - Contract
Amendment and New Contract



Hi Ian,



As requested by SG Legal to secure a fresh approval to proceed signing for
an addendum to the existing SLS agreement with Satsaco, I’m writing this
email to seek your approval.



Attached contract request form and addendum drafted by Legal for your
perusal.



*Template for Approver Email*

*Please copy this template out and do not update in this sheet.*

*No.*

*Question*

*Requester Input*

*Overview*

*1*

*Name of Agreement(s) (Full name of agreement, to be copied and pasted from
actual document to be reviewed)*

*e.g. “Services Agreement”*

Service Provider Services Agreement

*2*

*Sea entity (to be spelt out in full)*

*e.g. Garena Online Private Limited*

SHOPEE LOGISTICS SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED

*3*

*Counterparty name and information (applicable block to be completed in
full for compliance screening purposes and sanctions check)*

*Counterparty’s full and legal details*



Full legal name: SATSACO EXPRESS TRANSPORTATION PTE LTD

Country (incl state if USA) of incorporation: SINGAPORE

Registration Number: 198802723Z

Registered Address: 7 Airline Road #01-01 Cargo Agents Building E Singapore
819834

Authorised Signatory (Name & Title):

Peck Teck Meng

Senior Manager

*4*

*Type of request*

*To indicate the type of request:*

*i) Reviewing of counterparty's documents*

*ii) Preparing new contracts*

*iii) Amendments/addendums to existing contract/agreement*

*iv) Termination of existing agreement*

*v) Trransfer/assignment/novation of existing agreement to a new party*

*vi) Contract exemption requests*

*viii) Others (restrospective coversheets, request for ACRA Bizfile,
general enquiries, etc)*

*Amendments/addendums to existing contract/agreement*

*Background and purpose*

*5*

*Background and purpose / special instructions (not to be left empty)*

*Full background and purpose (e.g. what the counterparty will be doing
under the agreement, and whether any special arrangements need to be
addressed)*

We will launch Singapore export lanes (SG-TH, SG-MY),

initiated by SGBD (Singapore Business Development), to

promote Singapore’s export activities as part of our strategic
relationships with Enterprise SG.



Linehaul service for these two new lanes and Transit Warehouse operations
will be managed by the service provider, and given our existing contract,
we will amend the current contract to include these two new export lanes.

*Sharing of end-user's personal data*

*6*

*Will any end-user personal data be shared with the counterparty?*

Yes

*7*

*If yes, which markets do the end-user reside?*

Malaysia & Thailand

*Term*

*8*

*Start date:*

30 Sep 2024

*9*

*End date:*

-

*10*

*Renewal (if applicable):*

*To indicate the renewal:*

*i) Automatic renewal on recurring basis*

*ii) One time automatic renewal*

*iii) No automatic renewal*

*iv) Others*



*NOTE: PIC is responsible for monitoring the performance of the
counterparty, and should set a calendar reminder prior to the expiry of the
contract to review whether the contract should be extended or terminated.
To request the renewal or termination of a contract, you should follow the
contract request process.*

*Automatic renewal on recurring basis*

*Contract Value*

*11*

*12*

*Contract value in local currency, before GST*

140K USD (SG export only, 2025 forecast)

*Payment Terms*

*13*

*Is there a specific invoicing plan, deposit and payment timeline requested
by counter party?*

No

*14*

*Invoicing plan*



*What is the frequency for invoicing?*



*Please also indicate if any deposit, prepayment or bank guarantee is
required (and if so, the required amounts).*

Monthly invoicing (by every fifth working day of the next month)

*15*

*Payment timeline*

*e.g within 45 days from the receipet of invoice*



*Credit Terms (if any)*

30 days from the receipt of invoice

*Tax related documents*

*16*

*Does the counterparty have a certificate of residency?*

Yes

*17*

*Nature of Payments (only applicable if payment is made to non-Singapore
tax resident)*

*To indicate:*

*i) Royalty/Licensing*

*ii) Servicing fees*

*iii) Rental of movable property*

-

*18*

*Are the services performed wholly and exclusive outside of Singapore (only
applicable if payment is made to non-Singapore tax resident)*

*To indicate:*

*i) Yes*

*ii) No*

*iii) N/A*

Yes

*Requestor's team*

*19*

*Team name in full (not to be left blank)*

Cross Border SLS

*Person-in-charge of continuing performance (PIC)*

*20*

*Name*

Zhi Ann Chiong

*21*

*Email*

zhiann.chiong@shopee.com
